notes: Inactive conditional import must still report the missing referenced module item like upstream.
Nested inactive conditional import must preserve upstream missing-import diagnostic bytes.
Missing import in shader source must report the import failure before invalid WGSL body parsing.
Invalid override target diagnostics must match upstream source rendering.
Parser diagnostics must match upstream for direct entry compilation.
Validation diagnostics must match upstream for direct entry compilation.
Validation diagnostics must match upstream when an imported module is wrapped by another entry.
